发育流末世文。","text_exts":[{"e":3,"s":0,"text":"庇护所","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%BA%87%E6%8A%A4%E6%89%80\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774245461B75C6055%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227575531891954418457%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227551722754152598553%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BA%87%E6%8A%A4%E6%89%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763818810,"group_id":"7551722754152598553","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwaVSgxImAPmAAgCijtEYV4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"990029988771484","user_name":"宾莱市的徐知雅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"990029988771484","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7551722754152598553","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世度假+轻松+搞笑+凡尔赛】末日开启了。叶良人利用系统，将自己的避难所进行了全方位的升级。水龙头，可根据宿主需求，自动变成冷水、热水、饮料、咖啡、牛奶（甚至是82年拉菲）！制造的服装，不但能够防火，还能够抵御零下一百五十度以上的寒温！升级的网络，更是达到了万兆光纤！同时，他还在避难所里建造了生态牧场、大型植物养殖基地。……在外界所有人，面临无数天灾，饥不择食，难以存活的时候。叶良人喝着82年的拉菲，吃着m8澳洲和牛肉。就算是在末日，也还是要有仪式感的！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0f23bffaca11daadec40221f41aa3212~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"月初十","author_id":"","book_id":"7551722754152598553","book_name":"全球冰封，我打造了最强安全屋","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#80a0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9
